methods.method_name: filtered with a Whatman GF/C glass
measure the nutrients present following the method described by Parsons et al. (1984)
measured for fresh weight and surface area
traced onto tracing paper to measure the surface area with a digital planimeter (KP-92N, Uchida Yoko Co., Ltd., Tokyo, Japan)
estimated as a column by measuring the diameters and lengths of the axes and branches in each plant
determined following the method described by Evans (1988)
measured using a spectrophotometer (type-220, Hitachi Ltd., Tokyo, Japan)
